excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that a direct positional-copy expert is full decoder-only language-model validation
a claim that output-path expert diagnostics are positional-method promotion evidence
supported: A no-credential positional-copy expert audit for the two-block learned pointer-generator path.
Evidence about whether a direct method-bias copy expert repairs held-out 48/64 retrieval generalization.

decision.claim_boundary: The positional-copy expert mixture preserves capacity but does not generalize retrieval.

model.expert_policy: direct copy distribution is computed from the same positional bias available to the tested method
model.trained_parameters: token embeddings, two q/k/v/o attention blocks, vocab output projection, positional scale, copy/vocab gate, positional expert scale, pointer/expert gate
model.value_output_mode: learned mixture of vocab softmax, learned attention copy, and direct method-bias positional copy
